description: Food scraps, yard waste, and other biodegradable materials.
preparation: Ensure no plastic, glass, or metal is mixed in
Cut into smaller pieces for faster composting
commonMistakes: Composting meat, dairy, or oils (unless industrial composting)
Throwing organic waste in regular plastic bags
Including treated wood or pet waste
facts: Composting organic waste enriches soil and reduces the need for chemical fertilizers.
When organic matter breaks down in landfills, it releases methane, a potent greenhouse gas.
Nearly 30% of what we throw away is food scraps and yard waste.
